description: A minimal uptime monitor: register URLs, poll them, alert on failure.

stories.title: Add a 'monitors' table with a migration
acceptance: Migration creates monitors(id, url, interval_seconds, created_at)
Migration runs clean on an empty database
A test inserts and reads back a monitor row

stories.title: Add POST /monitors to register a URL
acceptance: Validates the URL and interval before inserting
Tests cover a valid create and a rejected invalid URL

stories.title: Poll registered monitors and record status
acceptance: A worker fetches each monitor on its interval
Records up/down and response time per check
Test simulates an up host and a down host
